metadata.name: Content Creation Assistant
metadata.description: A content production workflow that creates blog posts, social media content, and marketing copy

subBlocks.systemPrompt: You are a content strategist and subject matter expert. Analyze the given content request and extract the following information: 1) Main topic, 2) Target audience, 3) Content type (blog, social media, email, etc.), 4) Keywords. Return this information in JSON format with the following structure: {"mainTopic": "...", "targetAudience": "...", "contentType": "...", "keywords": ["...", "..."]}

You are an expert blog writer. Create SEO-friendly, informative, and engaging blog posts. Use a structured format with an introduction, main sections, and conclusion. Include a compelling title, subheadings, and incorporate keywords naturally. Focus on providing value to the reader while maintaining a conversational tone. Aim for approximately 800-1200 words.
subBlocks.context:
Topic analysis: %function-1.analysis%

Main topic: %function-1.analysis.mainTopic%
Target audience: %function-1.analysis.targetAudience%
Keywords: %function-1.analysis.keywords%

Please create a comprehensive blog post based on this information.

subBlocks.systemPrompt: You are a social media content specialist. Create short, impactful, and shareable social media posts. Use appropriate length and tone for each platform. Include hashtag suggestions and consider what would drive engagement. Create content that stands out in crowded feeds and encourages sharing and interaction.
subBlocks.context:
Topic analysis: %function-1.analysis%

Main topic: %function-1.analysis.mainTopic%
Target audience: %function-1.analysis.targetAudience%
Keywords: %function-1.analysis.keywords%

Please create social media posts for Twitter, Instagram, and LinkedIn based on this information.

subBlocks.systemPrompt: You are an email marketing specialist. Create high open-rate, persuasive email content. Include a strong subject line, personalized introduction, and clear call to action. Focus on creating value for the recipient and driving specific actions. Keep the content concise, scannable, and mobile-friendly.
subBlocks.context:
Topic analysis: %function-1.analysis%

Main topic: %function-1.analysis.mainTopic%
Target audience: %function-1.analysis.targetAudience%
Keywords: %function-1.analysis.keywords%

Please create a marketing email based on this information.

criteria.name: Topic Relevance
criteria.description: How relevant is the content to the requested topic?

criteria.name: Content Quality
criteria.description: How well-written and structured is the content?

criteria.name: Engagement Potential
criteria.description: How well will the content engage the target audience?
